sourceOverview.notes: GPT-5.x, GPT-4.1, o3/o4-mini. TTS: gpt-4o-mini-tts (13 voices). STT: Whisper, gpt-4o-transcribe. Realtime API for speech-to-speech.

audit.priceRangeSummary: Examples: GPT-5.4 $2.50/M input, $15/M output; speech models use minute/character/audio pricing depending on endpoint.
audit.limitsSummary: STT upload limit 25 MB/file; common audio formats only. Some diarization workflows need >30s audio. Realtime uses WebSocket sessions.
audit.regionSummary: Global by default; regional data residency endpoints available for supported models (e.g., EU/US) at premium pricing.
audit.sttLanguagesSummary: Whisper supports 98 languages; 4o transcribe is multilingual.
audit.freeTierSummary: No standing public free tier; credits/promotions may vary by account.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Strongest single-vendor native speech stack for text, STT, TTS, and realtime speech-to-speech. Distinguish model ID from voice selection.

supplementalResearch.title: 1. OpenAI (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 1. OpenAI (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. The de facto API standard. Base URL: `https://api.openai.com/v1/`

**LLM models (March 2026):**

| Model ID | Input $/1M | Output $/1M | Context | Max Output |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `gpt-5.4` | $2.50 (short) / $5.00 (long) | $15.00 / $22.50 | 400K–1.05M | 128K |
| `gpt-5.4-mini` | $0.75 | $4.50 | 400K | 128K |
| `gpt-5.4-nano` | $0.20 | $1.25 | 400K | 128K |
| `gpt-5.4-pro` | $30.00 / $60.00 | $180.00 / $270.00 | 400K–1.05M | 128K |
| `gpt-5.2` | $1.75 | $14.00 | 200K+ | — |
| `gpt-5` | $1.25 | $10.00 | 200K+ | — |
| `gpt-5-mini` | $0.25 | $2.00 | 200K+ | — |
| `gpt-4.1` | $2.00 | $8.00 | 1.05M | — |
| `gpt-4.1-mini` | $0.40 | $1.60 | 1.05M | — |
| `gpt-4.1-nano` | $0.10 | $0.40 | 1.05M | — |
| `gpt-4o` | $2.50 | $10.00 | 128K | — |
| `gpt-4o-mini` | $0.15 | $0.60 | 128K | — |
| `o4-mini` | $1.10 | $4.40 | — | — |
| `o3` | $2.00–$10.00 | $8.00–$40.00 | — | — |
| `o3-mini` | Lower | Lower | — | — |
| `o1` | $15.00 | $60.00 | — | — |

Long-context pricing activates above ~270K input tokens (2× input, 1.5× output). Batch/Flex pricing is 50% off standard. Date-pinned snapshots available (e.g., `gpt-5.4-2026-03-05`).

**TTS models:**

| Model ID | Pricing | Voices | Languages | Max Input |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `gpt-4o-mini-tts` | $0.60/1M text tokens + $12.00/1M audio tokens (~$0.015/min) | 13+ (alloy, ash, ballad, coral, echo, fable, nova, onyx, sage, shimmer, verse, marin, cedar) | 50+ | 2,000 tokens |
| `tts-1` | $15.00/1M chars | 6 (alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer) | — | 4,096 chars |
| `tts-1-hd` | $30.00/1M chars | 6 | — | 4,096 chars |

`gpt-4o-mini-tts` is steerable via system prompt (tone, emotion, accent, speed). Output formats: MP3, Opus, AAC, FLAC, WAV, PCM at 48kHz. Full streaming support.

**STT models:**

| Model ID | Pricing | Max File | Languages | Streaming |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `gpt-4o-mini-transcribe` | **$0.003/min** ($0.18/hr) | 25 MB | 99+ | Yes |
| `gpt-4o-transcribe` | $0.006/min ($0.36/hr) | 25 MB | 99+ | Yes |
| `gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize` | $0.006/min | 25 MB | 99+ | No |
| `whisper-1` | $0.006/min ($0.36/hr) | 25 MB | 99+ | No |

Supported audio formats: flac, mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, ogg, wav, webm.

**Realtime API (speech-to-speech):**

| Model ID | Audio In $/1M | Audio Out $/1M | Connection |
|---|---|---|---|
| `gpt-realtime` | $32.00 | $64.00 | WebSocket, WebRTC, SIP |
| `gpt-realtime-mini` | $10.00 | $20.00 | WebSocket, WebRTC, SIP |

Approximate cost: ~$0.06/min audio input, ~$0.24/min audio output on the full model.

**Rate limits:** 5-tier system (Free to Tier 5). Free tier: $100/month usage limit. Tier 1 ($5 paid): ~500K TPM, ~1,000 RPM. Tier 5 ($1,000+ paid, 30 days): up to $200,000/month.

**Free tier:** New accounts receive **$5 in free credits** (3-month expiry). No credit card required.

**Datacenters:** Hosted on Microsoft Azure. Data residency in US, EU, UK, Canada, Japan, South Korea, Singapore, India, Australia, UAE. EU residency has zero data retention; +10% price uplift for GPT-5.4 regional endpoints.

**GDPR:** SOC 2 Type 2, ISO 27001/27701, HIPAA (BAA available), DPA available, zero data retention option. API data not used for training by default.

**Integration notes:** OpenAI's API format is the industry standard. SSE streaming for text, WebSocket for Realtime (`wss://api.openai.com/v1/realtime`), WebRTC for browser-native voice, SIP for telephony. Official Python/Node.js/Go/Java/.NET SDKs.

---
